description_long: This kindergarten building features a playful facade with colorful window frames in red, green, and pink, and a variety of wooden textures. The front area includes a small slide and a fenced-in play space, suggesting a child-friendly environment. The structure is enclosed by plain white exterior walls on three sides, with a large window visible on one side wall. The rooflines are varied, with some overhanging eaves and a mix of flat and pitched sections. The ground in front of the building is paved, resembling a sidewalk or courtyard, and the interior is divided into several rooms with wooden partitions. The overall design is whimsical and inviting, with a focus on safety and accessibility for young children.
description: A colorful, child-friendly kindergarten with playful window frames, a slide, and a fenced play area, enclosed by plain white walls.
description_view_0: Side view showing plain white exterior walls and a glimpse of the wooden interior partitions.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the colorful facade, slide, fenced play area, and main entrance features.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a large horizontal window and more of the interior layout visible.
description_view_3: Rear view dominated by plain white walls, with only the tops of colorful windows and rooflines visible.
attribute_window_decoration: colorful window frames in red, green, and pink
attribute_architectural_style: storybook with playful, colorful accents and varied rooflines
